summary: CapyMatch Production Integrity Audit - P0 fixes verified. All 13 tests PASSED. Determinism confirmed: same endpoints return identical JSON on consecutive calls. No mock_data imports in production paths. No random.random() usage in decision_engine.py.
critical_code_review_comments: decision_engine.py: VERIFIED - No random imports, no random.random() usage. All intervention detection is deterministic based on athlete state/archetype.
athlete_store.py: VERIFIED - No mock_data imports. Uses _fetch_real_events(), _build_real_momentum_signals(), _build_real_program_snapshot() which query DB directly.
mission_control.py: VERIFIED - No mock_data imports. Uses _fetch_real_events_for_mc(), _build_real_snapshot_for_athletes() which query DB directly.
Events in DB are seeded data (Winter Showcase, College Exposure Camp, Spring Classic) - these are legitimate pre-populated data, not runtime mock generation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 determinism and no-mock-data fixes verified. All mission-control endpoints return identical JSON on consecutive calls. Events come from DB (3 seeded events). Signals come from real DB queries (interactions, stage changes). Snapshot computes real counts from athletes collection.

determinism_tests: test_mission_control_determinism_coach - PASS: myRoster, journey_state, attention_status, summary_lines, events, signals identical between calls
test_mission_control_determinism_director - PASS: programSnapshot, upcomingEvents, recruitingSignals identical between calls
test_signals_determinism - PASS: /api/mission-control/signals returns list (empty or real signals)
no_mock_data_tests: test_signals_no_mock_data - PASS: No fabricated signals like 'Received interest from UCLA'
test_events_from_database - PASS: Events come from DB with proper structure
test_snapshot_real_counts - PASS: Snapshot returns stable real counts (totalAthletes=11)
